case study that currently working required conduct interviews with dozen people spread across United States.
budget time constraints, would have been impossible these interviews face-to-face.

basic Skype service, which free easy download, allows connection between Skype users.

have have active Internet connection.
most interviewees this wasn't problem, used free version Skype connect

What subscribe Skype's additional services.
First, purchased subscription Skype's "Unlimited Canada" service, which lets place unlimited number calls phones United States Canada.
only $2.95/month, this even cheaper than landline.
(Which have since canceled, incidentally.

those interviewees wanted call online Skype number.
this works that essentially phone number from Skype.
phone number "in" countries.
bought American number, meaning that international code number "1," three-digit area code, just like phone number United States.
however, were doing telephonic interviews with people Chile, Estonia, Sweden, would make sense number associated with those countries, that your callers would incurring international charges when they placed call you.
course, receive calls placed your online Skype number, need have device which Skype loaded switched need connected Internet, need have Skype running.
these conditions someone tries call your online number, they won't able connect with you.
